workbench.intro: Global prompt workbench: manage video styles and edit each agent's prompts and tools in one place.
workbench.stylesDesc: Custom styles need an ID and label, plus optional AI video sub-modes (text-to-video / image-to-video / keyframes). A same-id PromptProfile is created automatically (prompt baseline follows storybook). Deleting a style clears related agent config.
workbench.styleVideoModesHint: Leave unchecked for storybook-style image/text compose only. Checked modes become available in storyboard shots.
workbench.label: Label
workbench.agentEditDesc: Super Video Master is the fixed orchestrator, isolated from sub-agents. Pick a Profile to edit prompts and tools.
workbench.subAgentsEmpty: No custom sub-agents yet. Use the button above to create one.
workbench.newAgentModalDesc: Clone a built-in sub-agent capability for this Profile.
workbench.selectProfileHint: Select a Profile above to begin.
workbench.defaultReadOnly: The default profile is a read-only system baseline. Create or select another profile to edit.
workbench.selectAgentHint: Choose an agent from the sidebar to edit.
workbench.restoredAllBuiltin: All built-in styles restored to system default
workbench.toolsHint: Manage runtime tools; system tools load by default and are hidden here. Add from the global Registry across agents.
workbench.skillsHint: Linked Skills can be activated for this agent. Add like tools; import/delete in the Skill library.
workbench.addSkillModalDesc: Once linked, this agent can activate the pack via /id in chat.
workbench.addSkillThesis: A Skill is a mountable recipe: it injects workflow guidance without dumping long references into context.
workbench.skillsNoneLinked: No Skills linked — add one so /activation works
workbench.skillsEmpty: No Skills yet. Import a pack in the Skill library or confirm built-ins are loaded.
workbench.addToolModalDesc: Pick a non-system tool from the global Registry; cross-agent mounting is allowed.
workbench.allBuiltinAdded: All built-in sub-agents are already in the roster
workbench.systemToolsHint: finish, ask_user_question, and related actions load by default and cannot be toggled.
workbench.toolGroupMultiScopeReadHint: These tools read multiple persisted entity types in one call; see each description for the exact query range.
workbench.saveHint: Saved under data/agents/profiles/{profile}/workspace.json; the service reloads agent config automatically.

a2ui.expiredHint: This question has expired. Please reply again in the chat.
a2ui.superseded: Replaced by a newer confirmation request
a2ui.noHistoryResponse: No user response recorded in history
a2ui.submitExpired: This question expired. Please reply again in the chat.
a2ui.submitAlreadyResolved: This confirmation is no longer valid. Refresh or ask again.
a2ui.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe any changes to structure or content…

skills.title: Skill library
skills.desc: Manage reusable production packs: import zip, validate format, delete user packs. Link Skills to agents in the prompt workbench.
skills.gateDesc: Drop or pick a zip; it is written to data/skills only after format checks pass.
skills.dropHint: Requires skill.json and non-empty system.md; folder name must match id
skills.catalogDesc: Built-ins are locked; deleting a user pack also clears agent allowlist references.
skills.deleteConfirm: Delete user Skill "{{id}}"? This cannot be undone.
